blocks.body: Summary page about passive voice stylistics: where the passive is appropriate (academic style, instructions, news), where it is better to use the active. Also consider typical errors: "by people", incorrect V3, redundant passive, tense agreement.

{ "title": "9. Short summary", "items": [ "Passive appropriate: scientific style, instructions, news, official documents.", "Active is better: when the performer is important, colloquially, for dynamic actions.", "Avoid \"by people/someone\" is redundant information.", "Check V3: written (not written), broken (not broken).", "Agree the tenses: was/were for the past, is/are for the present.", "Don't overload the text with the passive - combine it with the active.", "Ask: Who is doing the action? Important = active. No = passive." ] }
